CONTENT.Club career: Luckassen is a graduate of the AZ youth academy. He captained the youth team during the 2013–14 campaign. On 29 August 2014, he signed a professional contract with the club, keeping him there until 2018.Luckassen made his professional debut for the club against Dordrecht. He first played a whole match against Twente.On 10 July 2017, Luckassen moved to league rivals PSV on a five-year deal until 2022.He came off the bench on 15 April 2018 as PSV beat rivals Ajax 3–0 to clinch the 2017–18 Eredivisie title.On 28 August 2018, Luckassen moved to Bundesliga side Hertha BSC on a season-long loan for the season.On 31 August 19, Luckassen was loaned to Belgium side Anderlecht on a season-long loan. On 6 June 2020, PSV Eindhoven agreed to loan Luckassen to Anderlecht for another season.On 11 January 2021, due to a lack of playing time Luckassen ended his loan at Anderlecht, and moved to Turkish club, Kasımpaşa, on loan until the end of June.On 9 June 2021, he returned to Turkey on a new loan, joining Fatih Karagümrük.

CONTENT.International career: Luckassen was born in the Netherlands to parents of Ghanaian descent, and has represented the Netherlands at youth level.

SUMMARY: Derrick Luckassen (born 3 July 1995) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back.
